opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin is literally burning off, I'm covered in giant red welts, and I can't stop scratching.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on in the last couple of hours and it's terrifying — I'm scared my throat will close.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 2 hours ago after getting hot
symptom_narrative.character: severe flushing, burning, and huge red itchy welts all over
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the itching and burning are unbearable
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: trunk and limbs, spreading; even clothing seams bring up new welts
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on fast after heat exposure and keeps triggering with friction
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: flushing and relentless itch; I feel panicky about my airway
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have suspected mast cell activation and get flares, but this is a big one

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: suspected mast cell activation syndrome with urticaria/flushing

allergies_as_reported.substance: no confirmed drug allergy; multiple environmental triggers
allergies_as_reported.reaction_described: flushing and hives with heat and certain exposures

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing specific that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone and I'm frightened about my airway

communication_style.typical_message_style: frightened, focused on airway fears, describing the rash vividly

objective_data_offered.value: I'm flushed and covered in raised itchy welts over most of my body; stroking my skin brings up lines
I can breathe and swallow normally, no throat tightness or voice change
my pulse feels fast, maybe around 100 on my watch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: home wearable; consistent with distress/histamine, not measured clinically
